turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello, this is Riley on the refunds desk. How can I help?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: One thing first, we record these calls for training.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: To look this up, could you confirm the email tied to the order?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yeah, it's under my name with the email I always use.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I was charged for something I cancelled before it shipped.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood. Give me a moment to look at what happened here.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, I'll process the full amount back to your original payment method.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, as long as it's the full amount.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: This is ridiculous. Get me a supervisor please.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's reasonable. I'll escalate this so it gets handled faster.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Refund's processed, you'll see it within a few business days. Anything else?
